content:
🔥 noctalia-shell | QML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a beautiful, minimal, and highly customizable desktop shell experience for Wayland users.
✨ Key Features: • Native support for Niri, Hyprland, Sway, Scroll, Labwc and MangoWC • Extensive theming with predefined color schemes and automatic color generation from your wallpaper • Wallpaper management with Wallhaven integration • Notification system with history and Do Not Disturb • Multi-monitor support
📖 Summary: Noctalia Shell is a minimal and customizable desktop shell for Wayland, built on Quickshell (Qt/QML). It offers extensive theming, wallpaper management, a notification system, multi-monitor support, and a lock screen, with nearly 100 available plugins.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
